quotes.text: Hardware's reputation derives from the reality that a lot of companies spin out the hardware before the software is even written - so all hardware bugs have to get fixed in software.
quotes.author: bjt12345
quotes.source: Hacker News — What I learned selling 2,500 MIDI recorders: Hardware is not so hard
quotes.extraction_note: Concise observation on the interplay between hardware and software development cycles, revealing real engineering trade-offs.
